name: ENLARGED PERIVASCULAR SPACES
definition: ENLARGED / ATYPICAL VIRCHOW-ROBIN SPACES small invaginations of subarachnoid space following pia mater along perforating nutrient end giant sievelike Virchow-Robin spaces clusters of variable sized cysts with bizarre cystic configuration and mass effect

demographics.Location: inferior basal ganglia (lenticulostriate arteries); inferior third of putamen = état

distribution: inferior basal ganglia (lenticulostriate arteries); inferior third of putamen = état
discriminating_features: normal signal intensity of surrounding parenchyma
occasionally central high SI on T1WI ← inflow effect
small 1-2-mm round lesions isointense to CSF

general: normal signal intensity of surrounding parenchyma
occasionally central high SI on T1WI ← inflow effect
small 1-2-mm round lesions isointense to CSF
moderate 2-5 mm round lesions isointense to CSF
clusters of variably sized bizarre cystic spaces bordering ventricles / subarachnoid space
